purpose: Sprint 1 pre-migration baseline (multi-bodega foundation: nodes + lanes + sku_node_policy + views).
note: Migration es aditiva (sólo CREATE TYPE/TABLE/VIEW/INSERT seeds + COMMENT). No modifica filas existentes. Backups son row-counts de tablas referenciadas por los nuevos views.
rollback: DROP VIEW v_in_transit_por_nodo; DROP VIEW v_stock_por_nodo; DROP TABLE sku_node_policy, lanes, nodes; DROP TYPE lane_type_enum, node_type_enum;
